fields.description: Overtime below this many minutes is not counted (applies per segment: post-shift OT)
fields.label: Minimum OT Minutes

fields.description: OT is floored to this block in minutes (e.g. 30: 45 min becomes 30 min, 89 min becomes 60 min). 1 = floor to whole minutes only
fields.label: OT Block Minutes

fields.description: Pre-shift overtime below this many minutes is not counted
fields.label: Minimum Pre-Shift OT Minutes

fields.description: Count registered lunch-break overtime when check-ins span the break. Off = lunch-break OT registrations are ignored
fields.label: Allow OT In Rest Time

fields.description: Shift used when an employee has no Shift Assignment and no default shift (also used for Sunday OT registration)
fields.label: Default Shift

fields.description: Only employees whose ID starts with this prefix are processed when no explicit employee list is given
fields.label: Employee ID Prefix

fields.description: Working hours are floored to this block in minutes. 1 = no rounding
fields.label: Working Block Minutes

fields.description: Hours of day (0-23, comma separated) when the hourly job runs a FULL day reprocess instead of incremental
fields.label: Full Update Hours

fields.description: Comma-separated employee IDs excluded from attendance processing
fields.label: Exclude Employee IDs

fields.description: Hours the shift end is reduced for employees with maternity benefit (leave early but still counted as full hours)
fields.label: Maternity Benefit Hours

fields.description: Block Full Day Leave Application when the employee already has attendance with at least this many working hours
fields.label: Full Day Leave Block Hours

fields.description: Flag check-in/check-out earlier/later than the shift by at least this many minutes without an OT Registration
fields.label: Early/Late Threshold Minutes

fields.description: Start of the checkout window that flags female employees without an Employee Maternity record
fields.label: Female Checkout Check From
